creator: olivierd@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Update to 1.3
- Trim Makefile header
- Remove article from the COMMENT line
- Split documentation in another port (devel/py-babel-doc [1]) to avoid circular dependancy
- Fix pkg-plist with Python 3
- Update url in WWW entry (pkg-descr)


Note: It needs PR181216 [2] with Python 3, otherwise babel.date module fails.

Note 2: Documentation has been tested and compiled with textproc/py-sphinx 1.2 beta 1 (not presents in ports tree).

[1] https://people.freebsd.org/~olivierd/py-babel-doc.shar
[2] http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=181216

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
